senses.example: His ego was badly bruised when he lost the race.
senses.example_zh: 在比赛中失利,他的自尊心受到极大伤害。

senses.example: He got a foot sprain in his ankle. // sprain one's wrist
senses.example_zh: 他的脚踝扭伤了。// 扭伤了手腕

senses.example: Scratching the rash will make it worse. // The dog is always scratching.
senses.example_zh: 抓搔皮疹会使它更严重。// 那只狗老是搔痒。

senses.example: Mind you don't scratch the table with those scissors!
senses.example_zh: 小心别用剪刀划坏桌面!

senses.example: a scratch on a car door
senses.example_zh: 车门上的刮痕

senses.example: I moved forward a couple of paces.
senses.example_zh: 我向前移动了几步。

senses.example: I cannot walk at that pace.
senses.example_zh: 我无法以那种速度行走。

senses.def_en: to walk or stride back and forth across
senses.example: She paced up and down the room, waiting for the phone to ring.
senses.example_zh: 她在房里踱来踱去,等着电话响。

senses.example: Absence sharpens love between lovers.
senses.example_zh: 小别加深恋人间的感情。

senses.example: Darkness is the absence of light.
senses.example_zh: 黑暗就是缺乏光亮。

derivatives: absent a. 缺席的;心不在焉的

senses.example: The concert will be performed in the presence of the Queen.
senses.example_zh: 女王将出席音乐会。

senses.example: She has a nice voice but absolutely no stage presence.
senses.example_zh: 她声音不错,但毫无台风。

senses.def_en: the act of showing sb. sth. so that it can be checked or considered
senses.example: The check is payable on presentation.
senses.example_zh: 此支票交银行即可兑现。

senses.def_en: the way in which sth. is said, offered, shown, explained etc. to others
senses.example: The presentation of food can be as important as the taste.
senses.example_zh: 食物的外观和味道同样重要。

senses.def_en: the act of giving sb. a prize or present at a formal ceremony
senses.example: The mayor will be on hand to make the presentations.
senses.example_zh: 市长将亲临现场颁奖。

senses.def_en: an event at which a new product or idea is described and explained
senses.example: The charts and graphs helped me understand the presentation.
senses.example_zh: 图表有助我理解报告的内容。

senses.example: There is a presentation of a new play tonight.
senses.example_zh: 今晚有一场新戏演出。

entries.mnemonic: parlia(说话)+ment→“议会”是谈论政事的地方

senses.example: The Parliament decided to impeach the President.
senses.example_zh: 国会决定弹劾总统。

derivatives: parliamentary a. 议会的,国会的

senses.example: In Britain, members of the Cabinet are chosen by the Prime Minister.
senses.example_zh: 在英国,内阁成员是由首相挑选的。

senses.example: a file cabinet
senses.example_zh: 文件柜

extras.title: scratch
extras.content: up to scratch 合格,处于良好状态 // from scratch 从零开始,从头做起 He lost all his money and had to start again completely from scratch. 他损失了所有的钱,只好再从头做起。

extras.title: pace
extras.content: set the pace 起带头作用 // keep pace (with) (与…)齐步前进 She found it hard to keep pace with him as he strode off. 他大步走开了,她感到很难跟上他。

extras.title: presence
extras.content: presence of mind 镇定自若 // in sb.'s presence 当着某人的面,有某人在场 John never seemed at ease in my presence. 约翰在我面前总是显得不自在。
How are we to know that it wasn't you who made the scratch? 译文:我们怎么知道这划痕不是你造成的呢?
